title: Change atomic URI
body:
Vendor containers/image#81

Fix #189 
Fix #194 

Signed-off-by: Antonio Murdaca runcom@redhat.com

comments.body: @mtrmac why is there a leading / in your example with the dockerhost? That's not supposed to be there right?
@runcom I can’t see a leading `/`; the first `/` separates host name and namespace, e.g. `localhost/mynamespace/myimagestream:latest` or `localhost:555/mynamespace/myimagestream:latest`.
@mtrmac sorry - I should pay more attention before commenting (I though $docker-port]/ was $dockerhost]/)
